case_title: YU LAN YEE VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY YEE, YU LAN AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-06-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-13-2019 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-03-2020 ORDERED DESTROYED
(SC-152) ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL GRANTED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-06-2019 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO NOV-13-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-13-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-13-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF YU LAN LEE IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED INTERPERTER CARMEN LI. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VIRGINA HO, CLAIMS. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YEE, YU LAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO PLAINTIFF DID NOT PROVE BUS DRIVER ACTED NEGLIGENTLY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
